notableEvents.label: Dane Myers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dane Myers doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Adolis García. Blake Dunn scores.

notableEvents.label: Blake Dunn reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Blake Dunn reaches on a missed catch error by first baseman Alec Bohm, assist to shortstop Trea Turner. Nathaniel Lowe to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Trea Turner steals (8) 2nd base. Trea Turner to 3rd. Trea Turner advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher P.J. Higgins.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Blake Dunn reaches on a missed catch error by first baseman Alec Bohm, assist to shortstop Trea Turner. Nathaniel Lowe to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Justin Crawford pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Justin Crawford pops out softly to third baseman Sal Stewart in foul territory.
